examples: This does not minimize the supremacy of their achievements, which outstrip our own as the sub-four-minute milers outstrip our jogging.
If they could be turned into usable crops, they could outstrip even Hevea.
Within the next few years, jobs will outstrip demand in some professions.
Many have good intensions that far outstrip their knowledge of the cause they choose to support.
Dawson dismisses suggestions like FORBES' that supply will keep pace with or outstrip demand.
